context: This criteria evaluates whether the agent uses the ebook-library skill's metadata lookup flow correctly on a small Calibre fixture library, and whether it identifies the Jules Verne title accurately without guessing.

checklist.name: correct title and author
checklist.description: Correctly identifies the book as 'Twenty Thousand Leagues under the Sea' by Jules Verne.

checklist.name: reports a book id
checklist.description: Returns a concrete book_id obtained from the fixture library rather than omitting it or inventing one.

checklist.name: uses metadata-first workflow
checklist.description: Uses an appropriate metadata lookup flow such as find_books.py or list_books.py, instead of starting with a broad global content search.

checklist.name: brief method explanation
checklist.description: Briefly explains which script or command was used to find the answer.
